---
title: "SLAM Metabolic Class COD and healthcard"
author: "William Mueller"
data: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y %B %d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
--- 

```{r setup, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(consoler)
library(SLAM)
set.seed(365)

# setting global knitr options for r markdown output
knitr::opts_chunk$set(autodep = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE)
```

# Load in input data

```{r read in censuses}
census_04_path <- "/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/04_create_census/output/20250426_all_cohort/complete_census.csv"
census_06_path <- "/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/06_create_figures/output/20250426_all_cohort/complete_census.csv"

census_04 <- read.csv(census_04_path)
census_06 <- read.csv(census_06_path)
```
